_comment: Hand-confirmed Beeper chat identities — Ben's word only, NEVER machine-guessed. Keyed by phone (chat titles are address-book names and ambiguous: two bare-'sam' threads exist). Consumed by scripts/lib/field-warmth.mjs loadBeeperRecency(). person = canon worklist name.

identities.title: Sam
identities.note: Sam Davies — Defy, core partner ($121K critical path). Chat titled bare 'Sam'; no GHL phone on file, so machine match was impossible.
